title: Regional Dispatch Cache
subtitle: Regional dispatch consoles query the same records repeatedly
objective: Optimize repeat regional reads with edge and service-level caching.
constraints: Use at least one edge/read cache layer

concepts.title: Edge Read Layer
concepts.description: CDN or cache should serve repeated regional reads.

concepts.title: Protected API Entry
concepts.description: Requests should pass through load balancer to API.

concepts.title: Origin Durability
concepts.description: Origin state must be retained in database.
